Title: Generate PM WO with Inspection Form
Preconditions: PM record active for asset A, Inspection Form IF001 associated, PM due date reached
Steps:
1. Run PM generation (PMWOGEN or cron)
2. Open generated WO
Expected Result: PM WO created with WOTYPE=PM, linked asset A, Inspection Form IF001 available on WO

Title: Record All Inspection Points as Pass
Preconditions: PM WO with IF001 in APPR status assigned to Inspector
Steps:
1. Open WO
2. Complete all inspection questions with PASS or acceptable values
3. Save inspection
4. Change WO status to COMP
Expected Result: WO status changes to COMP without errors; no corrective WO created; inspection results stored

Title: Fail Critical Inspection Question and Auto-Create Corrective WO
Preconditions: PM WO with IF001 where question Q_CRIT_LEAK is configured as critical with AUTOCREATEWO=Y
Steps:
1. Open WO
2. Set Q_CRIT_LEAK to FAIL
3. Save inspection results
Expected Result:
System automatically creates a new Corrective WO:
- WOTYPE=CM
- PARENT = PM WO
- ASSETNUM same as PM WO
- Priority based on severity mapping
Link visible in Related Records

Title: Prevent Completion When Critical Failure Without Corrective WO
Preconditions: PM WO with IF001; Q_CRIT_TEMP configured critical; user will fail question but script temporarily disabled for auto-creation (simulate missing corrective)
Steps:
1. Open WO
2. Set Q_CRIT_TEMP to FAIL
3. Save
4. Attempt to change status to COMP
Expected Result: System blocks status change to COMP and displays message indicating critical failure without corrective WO; WO remains in current status

Title: Allow Completion When Non-Critical Failure Without Corrective WO
Preconditions: PM WO with non-critical question Q_NONCRIT_NOISY
Steps:
1. Set Q_NONCRIT_NOISY to FAIL
2. Save
3. Change status to COMP
Expected Result: WO allowed to move to COMP; no corrective WO required; failure detail retained in inspection results for analysis

Title: Multiple Failures Generating Multiple Corrective WOs
Preconditions: PM WO with questions Q_CRIT_LEAK and Q_CRIT_VIB both critical with AUTOCREATEWO=Y
Steps:
1. Fail both critical questions
2. Save inspection
3. Review related records
Expected Result: Two distinct corrective WOs created, each linked to the PM WO, with descriptions referencing the respective inspection questions

Title: Validation of Mandatory Inspection Questions
Preconditions: PM WO with IF001 where certain questions marked mandatory
Steps:
1. Open WO
2. Answer only some mandatory questions
3. Save
4. Attempt to change status to COMP
Expected Result: System prevents completion and lists missing mandatory questions; WO remains in current status

Title: Supervisor Override of Completion Without Corrective WO
Preconditions: Workflow configured with Supervisor decision node on exception
Steps:
1. Create scenario with critical failure but corrective WO not created
2. Attempt to complete WO
3. Supervisor receives workflow task
4. Supervisor enters justification and approves completion
Expected Result: WO moves to COMP after Supervisor approval; justification stored in log/long description; audit trail maintained

Title: Reporting of PMs Generating Corrective WOs
Preconditions: Reporting environment configured; sample data present
Steps:
1. Run report 'Corrective WOs from PM Inspections'
2. Filter by date range and asset class
Expected Result: Report lists PM WOs and associated corrective WOs; counts and percentages match test data; filters function correctly

Title: Script Error Handling and Logging
Steps:
1. Simulate configuration error (e.g., missing INSPECTION_RULES row)
2. Fail a critical question
3. Save
Expected Result: System logs a meaningful error message; processing does not corrupt data; if design specifies, completion is blocked until configuration is corrected

Title: Mobile Execution of Inspection
Preconditions: Maximo Mobile configured; inspector logged in on mobile device
Steps:
1. Open assigned PM WO in mobile app
2. Complete inspection questions including a critical failure
3. Sync data
Expected Result: Inspection results synchronized to server; corrective WO created as per rules; links visible in desktop UI

Title: Performance under Volume
Preconditions: Test environment with large number of inspection records and PM WOs
Steps:
1. Execute batch PM generation
2. Execute multiple inspections and failure scenarios
3. Monitor response times
Expected Result: Average response time within acceptable limits (e.g., <2s for script triggers); no timeouts or deadlocks observed
